name: Lucinda Guinn, EMILY's List
subject: Meet the guy who bragged about writing the tax scam bill >>
body:
| [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6f66/24c69fd9/155e69f0b/1890e973/569524417/VEsH/ "https://www.emilyslist.org/donate?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFCL14N_digital_email_20171208_JackyRosenCandFR_inact&source=WQEFCL14N_digital_email_20171208_JackyRosenCandFR_inact")
---

Peter,

Not only did Sen. Dean Heller vote for the tax scam bill last week, he **bragged** about being one of its chief architects!

A reminder: The bill would deliver tax breaks to giant corporations and help the top one percent get richer while hardworking American families suffer.

If Heller's proud of **_that,_** then it's time to replace him with someone better for the job.

That's why we've endorsed Jacky Rosen to defeat him next year.

**[Donate $3 now to send your support to Jacky. 100% of your donation will go directly to her campaign.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6f66/24c69fd9/155e69f0b/1890e96c/569524417/VEsE/ "https://emilyslist.org/donate/candidate/jacky-rosen1?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+now+to+send+your+support+to+Jac&utm_campaign=WQEFCL14N_digital_email_20171208_JackyRosenCandFR_inact&source=WQEFCL14N_digital_email_20171208_JackyRosenCandFR_inact")**

This isn't the first time Heller has voted in lockstep with the Trump agenda. In July, he broke his promise to Nevada families by casting the deciding vote to advance legislation to repeal Obamacare and strip health insurance from tens of millions of Americans.

That's why we've put him "On Notice." It's also why he's one of the most vulnerable senators up for re-election next near.

Jacky's building a strong campaign to take Heller down, and she's counting on our support.

**Rush a $3 donation to Jacky's campaign now and help her defeat Dean Heller next year. Remember, 100% of what you give will go directly to her:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Support-Jacky](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6f66/24c69fd9/155e69f0b/1890e96d/569524417/VEsF/ "https://emilyslist.org/donate/candidate/jacky-rosen1?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgSupportJacky&utm_campaign=WQEFCL14N_digital_email_20171208_JackyRosenCandFR_inact&source=WQEFCL14N_digital_email_20171208_JackyRosenCandFR_inact")**

Thank you,

Lucinda Guinn
Vice President of Campaigns, EMILY's List

name: The White House
subject: Resolute Reads
body:
1600 Daily REAL NEWS PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=64ff5a3e64174ae08cc4cd158e4f11ce36f59364e05f70b2f7c5c18f43efdecd2db35ce3e63dbc8a98109005acb3823c8edf70c18c745bf5
Top al-Qaeda leader reported killed In Afghanistan in U.S.-Afghan operation

- The Washington Post

On Tuesday, the U.S. military command in Afghanistan confirmed that a joint U.S.-Afghan operation killed Omar bin Khatab, the most senior leader killed in the country since the Taliban was driven from power in late 2001. Multiple other al-Qaeda operatives were killed in the operation, as well, officials said. General John Nicholson Jr., the U.S. Commander in Afghanistan, also confirmed that Mullah Shah Wali, leader of the Taliban’s “Red Unit,” died along with his deputy commanders. The Taliban Red Unit was “responsible for planning numerous suicide bombings and improvised-explosive attacks.”

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=64ff5a3e64174ae0c793bb2e62a6bca8f88dd646480adbef21c61c03f7408b5567308addd92edd1095955d1c6567b6fb41acaaf97552fe16
Senate confirms Kirstjen Nielsen, top White House aide, to lead Homeland Security

- The Washington Post

This week, the Senate confirmed attorney and cybersecurity expert Kirstjen Nielsen as America’s new Secretary of Homeland Security. As The Washington Post reports, Nielsen will be the country’s first DHS Secretary who has previous experience working at the agency.

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=64ff5a3e64174ae07eab4a195c47a21a916d038b829a222f9437fab00d9f0a58c8f79a15072058be3aa018d8a905180f19a7eb5777ac3ebc
Customs begins testing border wall prototypes

- The Hill

U.S. Customs and Border Patrol began physical testing on prototypes for the U.S.-Mexico border wall this week. “Physical testing of the samples includes efforts to scale or breach the walls, using tools such as jackhammers and saws,” The Hill reported.

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=64ff5a3e64174ae0c32f2a47ca5673301b6a12c092114a37b5d5c24d781cb557a1b421857483a6d3915ca726b262b71c834ff4543b893c1b
U.S. files suit to seize antiquities looted by Islamic State militants

- The Wall Street Journal

U.S. officials have identified several ancient objects allegedly looted by ISIS, stemming from concerns that these items provide the terrorist group with a financial lifeline. “These court actions are the latest step in a continuing effort to disrupt the ability of ISIS and other terrorist groups to finance their operations,” the U.S. Attorney for the District of Columbia said.

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=64ff5a3e64174ae07f4123d51273e67a080fb13df0cb01d670f9e4d0a0c077193540901f883e737923f7328914f1cef446fcf7d8a1f93fed
Survey: US businesses added a solid 190,000 jobs in November

- The Associated Press

American businesses added nearly 200,000 jobs last month, with manufacturing helping to drive the growth with an increase of 40,000 jobs, the largest gain this year. “The job market is red hot,” Moody’s Analytics Chief Economist Mark Zandi said.

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=64ff5a3e64174ae08ad92df6c61a50d8f367cf1db962b09e1ffdb150ab890e276ca8ec5658c211365cbb539f5e96c4c35d4e4d8942a3dd36
Mike Pence: ‘Trump is a believer’

- The Washington Examiner

In an interview with the Christian Broadcasting Network, Vice President Mike Pence spoke about religion and public service. “Let me be clear: President Trump is a believer and so am I,” the Vice President said. “And we understand the role of faith in the life of this nation.”

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=64ff5a3e64174ae0c1d4e4500f83788dff9b03e11bd29614ed65cf679452a049d4fad565b976bf4b6e2941f861997c14b3650a09e6af7f3f
Why President Trump is right to recognize Jerusalem as Israel's capital

- The Washington Free Beacon

Matthew Continetti, editor in chief of The Washington Free Beacon, writes that President Donald J. Trump’s recognition of Jerusalem as Israel’s capital and his decision to move the U.S. embassy is “a common sense appraisal of the world.” But it is also “one of the boldest moves any U.S. president has made since the beginning of the Oslo ‘peace process’ in 1993.”

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=64ff5a3e64174ae07f9e14c68eece6fcc885331c26adb471d5e30c3451a22d48f3df51be5294f7dd471460940e0491b533867dff096e63df
Privacy Policy |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=64ff5a3e64174ae000975abd69c8d98d03af6b479d446824cf4c0b7304814b1a64cb147929d252159a5a8b38ad5ced6d85fc3f1df5db4ed4
Contact the White House |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d4967145846ef655d400322a60dc78601e9313ddce5a24c654f53eb2f7b9dd9a3c2b9e559a5fc7d71c8085824ae26bc367
Unsubscribe

name: Team Donnelly
subject: undoing innovation and economic growth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
Without Net Neutrality, internet service providers could choose what you see and how fast you see it. |
---

| | | Peter,

The term "Net Neutrality" might sound complicated and confusing. But it's simple to explain what the Federal Communications Commission (FCC) is doing by repealing it: By ending Net Neutrality, it is opening the door to allowing internet providers to slow down or speed up content based on their profits and political leanings.

Right now, everything on the internet is treated the same, but without Net Neutrality, internet service providers could choose what you see and how fast you see it. _The principle that makes the internet an engine of innovation and such a powerful platform for free speech would be undone._

**[We want to know your thoughts on keeping internet access open and fair -- will you take this survey and let Joe know what you think about Net Neutrality?](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c25f7/7377f838/32050473/51fa4b58/1940625181/VEsH/ "https://www.surveymonkey.com/r/VG2GGRK")**

If Net Neutrality ceases to exist, Hoosiers will suffer. Family-owned businesses that can't pay to have their products prioritized won't be able to compete with corporations that can. Hoosier students might lose unfiltered access to the resources they need to succeed. And families would see costs rise as providers charge higher prices to deliver the same level of content.

Net Neutrality is an absolute necessity if we're going to give mom and pop shops a fair chance to do business and prevent our biggest corporations from deciding whose voices are heard. **[Will you take this survey to let us know how important Net Neutrality is to you?](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c25f7/7377f838/32050473/51fa4b58/1940625181/VEsE/ "https://www.surveymonkey.com/r/VG2GGRK")**

\-- Team Donnelly

name: Virginia Election Alert
subject: Meet Tim's new opponent:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
Derek, it's official. There's another Republican running to try to defeat Tim next November.
**Meet Nick Freitas: He's a very conservative member of the Virginia House of Delegates best known for being anti-LGBTQ, anti-choice, and in the pocket of the NRA.** He championed dangerous "personhood" legislation that could have banned all abortion, restrictive anti-LGBTQ legislation that would've legalized discrimination against Virginians based on who they love, and boasted about his support from the NRA.

name: Lucy Flores, Our Revolution
subject: Reform the DNC
body:
The Unity Reform Commission's final meeting concludes today in Washington
#
Friends,
In the 2016 primary many superdelegates in states won by Senator Sanders pledged their votes to Secretary Clinton, millions of independents were shut out from closed primaries and caucuses, and the DNC leadership conducted business behind closed doors. The Unity Reform Commission's final meeting concludes **today** in Washington, and Our Revolution is fighting harder than ever for meaningful change to the DNC.
[**Make a $5 contribution to help Our Revolution organize the grassroots that we are on this Commission to represent.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7add2/bed43eb/22273896/75ff785d/3873461436/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-dnc?refcode=em171209-full")
The Democratic Party must change. If it is to have any hope of recouping the 1,100 state legislative seats lost over the past eight years and advancing a progressive vision for the country, they'll need Bernie supporters to do it. **But millions of us aren't even able to participate in the primary election process.**
Superdelegate campaign consultants and corporate lobbyists are no substitute for grassroots organizers, activists, and working people that the Democratic Party purports to represent. Bernie's independence and authenticity connected with people in a way that the Democratic establishment simply was not able to in 2016, but that doesn't mean they can't change. That's why we're meeting in Washington today.
[**Please make a $5 contribution as we fight for democracy and voting rights on the DNC Unity Reform Commission this weekend.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7add2/bed43eb/22273896/75ff785d/3873461436/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-dnc?refcode=em171209-full")
The Democratic Party must practice what it preaches by making it easier for people to vote, not harder; by working alongside the working families and middle class of this country, not lobbyists and consultants; and by opening up DNC operations in a manner that is transparent, fair, and accountable to all.
In solidarity,
Lucy Flores
Board Member
Our Revolution

We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7add2/bed43eb/22273896/75ff785e/3873461436/VEsA/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Help us continue transforming American politics and fighting for progressive candidates and causes by [contributing to Our Revolution here](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7add2/bed43eb/22273896/75ff7859/3873461436/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR").

name: Debbie Wasserman Schultz
subject: Cut Medicare & Social Security? Not on my watch.
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail
body:
| |
---
| |
---
| "Rubio tells a secret: **After giving a tax cut to the rich, GOP will cut Social Security and Medicare"**
\-- _Sun-Sentinel_ , 12/1/2017 This is big, team. In a moment of rare truth, Marco Rubio admitted that after cutting taxes for the rich, they will move on to making "structural changes" to Medicare and Social Security. **"Structural changes" of course, being Washington-speak for "cutting" Medicare and Social Security.** [_**I will fight with everything I have to protect Medicare and Social Security. But I need you in this fight. Let Republicans know that we will not stand for cuts.**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113e44/622b7b5b/7f26c26/307ba648/2273356533/VEsH/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e1712mss") [_**Add your name >>**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113e44/622b7b5b/7f26c26/307ba648/2273356533/VEsE/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e1712mss") It's bad enough that the disastrous Republican tax plan is inches away from becoming law. If the final version is anything like what the Senate passed, that law could raise taxes on middle class families and rip away health care from millions of Americans. And of course under the Trump/GOP plan, billionaires and corporations would make out like bandits. In order to pay for these outregeous tax breaks, Republicans are targeting seniors and those most vulnerable among us to pay for those expenses. I have four words for them: _**Not on my watch**_. [_**Join me and demand Republicans stay away from Medicare and Social Security.**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113e44/622b7b5b/7f26c26/307ba648/2273356533/VEsF/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e1712mss") Thank you. Debbie |

subject: Leah's Weekly Roundup 12/09/2017 🇺🇸
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Leah for Senate
body:
And we thought we knew the extent of the unconstitutional John Doe investigation... it was bad. But this week, we found out it was worse than we thoug
*|MC_PREVIEW_TEXT|* |
---
| | |
---
| | | Dec. 9, 2017

And we thought we knew the extent of the unconstitutional John Doe investigation... it was bad. But this week, we found out it was worse than we thought.
---
|
---
| The Wisconsin Department of Justice - while investigating who leaked sealed documents to "The Guardian" newspaper found out that the Government Accountability Board collected, kept and even sorted Leah's emails into a file called "opposition research." This included private medical information she discussed with her daughter.

It's clear now more than ever that Wisconsin needs a U.S. Senator who will stand up for our freedoms and rights. Leah has proven she will do it even though she's received death threats and has had her privacy violated in this criminal way.
---
| In news you may have missed this week, one of [Leah's bills was signed by Governor Walker into law](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=fa60ea77876c4caa9df30e22650c0f7c&_e=82QsVhqg06_xbsT_aCgLaz18ImxeSIVxrUJzLvz9fwHyHOhApeABjG4Mtz3OKCXXE_fEPvaEV6lNtpA0-Mb7sqwo0zkrs3RntS0ExmGnQLg2NZLYisfBQQTdQdGRZBRakfb1YyuiHjEctnjWTZKZ47wIN5WyyWrU7uVLlWWOpUEdH7jHGwe3J55SBhK9zbtrHWTInzpmU2vvSMN73OMfOG5_Pv4q3tepjgvcNQ6wyrs08zSyQKsp5967KZANLaK74IfUXSmnUKGesFH38hmO94Kp_TuQXFjEcR8cO-PPZh6v4MLwkYMR5kIgljWVUO0r2Myj7PZfTRF-O_x1XUGbNQ%3D%3D). It fixes a glitch in the law and ensures that the state will reimburse our brave veterans in the National Guard for their full tuition.

Leah also [took a strong stance](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=fa60ea77876c4caa9df30e22650c0f7c&_e=82QsVhqg06_xbsT_aCgLa1553b79wgoasPAPTv7SJ2g9JH5dbV_ptVucCuSh_g2AGRayS2BwF895rS9lmihWmDG7lEPef3e6w_476zpFLRH4qLqG5T8T-OEI0W8_veuiIoOmbgTSdcbwmCEfvTLlC0yjP_O5XTn-yISqARHn9TlpOiegcWEMMVyKViOkG3SyUo9R_WUzB3R8KNyTYjGRiNQAqXdpWXFYwuFgNUmqdmvtqLHJ6SjWDqfRB8eZwYbRfdCil3YT-Lsg6m4p7l97_NlKkU0hIB_jT79Ep1GNh10%3D) standing with President Trump in calling Jerusalem the true capital of Israel.
---
| As always, keep up with Leah as she runs for Wisconsin's U.S. Senate seat by following her [Facebook](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=fa60ea77876c4caa9df30e22650c0f7c&_e=hukonS34L4tJ27aODxt6-BvjQ8sWaEP-1CYEuBAYeb9B5w4VMnFf7rUfkGzd8QbBZA2HN0UhtPEAb1BjVDsbjrc0rEOV3PAO0UAhS0rKyKshV_3r2E-2OmCtv9rue8P_QXgumIIaqEm632vm2Yoc601GcItGbEp4Bx3MgI9CjiL5--3C74ZD02pJjwbNt4nBUP-SC-HbXJKv4D14zHqfJbYxL6qDAVoSP7WHlSFh-VgOA3BZrT7CQ50kN8tyn2W4H3E0hRT1ES6_MjdOoPv0IQ%3D%3D), [Twitter](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=fa60ea77876c4caa9df30e22650c0f7c&_e=jCSpHElmOxkExdYQ5oBluTWDpUTfV2WNhJA5j-buj3yMPlpuZjdcVzvKxZxvFAOTMHCvKx7xFZtkvAdB--aY2aQY2APg1SpKPhi4mEdLGadzGT20MBONIlJYRnjCiWKXscLmFfQt0p4gOiqsSc6cQy9ZfuI7V2HGTV0CVauMeQdyD4Wo9pD6ljJCgM8-iymUPo5LU3YdB66mlJ9fyk-0vguhpindNbCFfAhfvx2_JNpGjb-kvMT4E2QnVGpxDd70FK2JV76wFeJeP5djbmW10w%3D%3D) and [Instagram](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=fa60ea77876c4caa9df30e22650c0f7c&_e=sKCDfktqxfiKAbVSabiROxBYlecDXXQxDvBxoEzP0eWldHM2UrZkEamT-2ypWff8_AtvXnHDYjw_gjRQVK5JVVtVMBX9ccFawsrj0dhciusTMJVsrHn_D_ktWLTLnGKDIRbmc-E10ZFKBJ-Uts_SczWI21fopXeVsczM5nqBPXBSb89EKMVJCgoVHT7hjkhwXlAxqU7VgFHhYsYVNN1MOcj4tElmMxjcjKeCVoljja_bIRVdAJAplJBj41L00FXaX-8_WMcgqQMywCuk9NtiIA%3D%3D) pages.

## News that drove the week

## [John Doe investigation into Gov. Scott Walker gathered millions of pages of records from Republicans](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=fa60ea77876c4caa9df30e22650c0f7c&_e=82QsVhqg06_xbsT_aCgLa2e8NeuD0eCpQaIZiAcuWBCXgsPSuKKWIyRfrNEaBv3VYXgzpSzfUSgY4nASARVpp9J37V_ZU0d_WsV7C90cECThlghBn9HPoDgQjKQMdTzdyfxVWJZgG7XN254yPC9kLztm-7N1FtSyfKqgndRTiGty4v6Tdb-khIMVofHRYH8DLr8n3X2BiyRen7Lmq3G48Yul-vWtrOOVvmb6e9mZoq_0uga319WJdmQ9Ylzc0lWaOw9usMgm-Dockyk4O7f6VIFSapvYd1hlZvGpcacFg4Tf9pnVus-H2eYCUKg_husRzh2TXAF9it4cbKmQzLR2WypLT0usmWLta5hlVBW3oyARZDRHR38gL_eJm5cuwxOSAd-Bd5gpr4j9RrBngjHIRS03EqJoXMEf5ViT2tUYy5s%3D)
John Doe prosecutors issued at least 218 subpoenas that generated emails and other documents totaling millions of pages, according to a report by GOP Attorney General Brad Schimel that became public Wednesday. U.S. Senate candidate and state Sen. Leah Vukmir (R-Brookfield) told WTMJ-AM (620) on Thursday that she was horrified that investigators had scooped up emails with her daughter that included private medical information. "It is un-American," Vukmir said. "I am going to exhaust all options — both legal and legislative — for recourse here."
